paper.primary_title: Hybrid Transformers for Music Source Separation
paper.related_title: Hybrid Spectrogram and Waveform Source Separation

install_notes: The upstream minimal requirements pin torchaudio>=0.8,<2.1, which conflicts with Python 3.12 wheel availability.
The validated route installs torch==2.4.1 and torchaudio==2.4.1 first, then installs the pinned repository with --no-deps.
Running from the run root can shadow the installed package because the cloned repository directory is named demucs; verify.py forces sys.path to the repo root before importing.
asset_notes: Default htdemucs checkpoint download is not required for this CPU minimal task.
The verifier uses demucs.pretrained.demucs_unittest and checks a real separated WAV artifact.
